metadata.title: International Symposium: Medically Assisted Dying: Global Trends and Asian Perspectives

records.duty: a. Sharing of Y's phone no. and email address with S? b. Sharing Zoom link with Y c. Inform Y of the location of the slides and recordings
Meet speaker at 8:00 am on 1/F of Hotel Jen and walk with them to MTR Exit B2 and then through the station to MTR Exit C2 to ACR and Whatsapp J about the siutation
records.materials_needed: 1. List of non-local speakers 2. Programme booklet, which contains photos 3. a card to be held at the Hotel?
records.notes: Emergency plan: S will take care of the venue and J will go to the hotel too

records.duty: IT set up (including the display of the background slide) and show the speakers how to use the equipment before the session
records.materials_needed: uploaded to the desktop: 1. MP4 of Prof Chen's video

records.duty: Put up a poster and seating plan and programme on the wall at the entrance
records.materials_needed: 1. poster 2. seating plan x2 3. programme x 2 4. glu-tack/ dispensary tape

records.duty: Stick a paper "no." notice for each seat
records.materials_needed: 1. number notice from 1 to [x] 2. dispensary tape

records.duty: at the beginning, ensure that the event is being recorded
ensure that the event is being recorded on Zoom and that slides and video recordings are shown properly for Zoom participants throughout the event
records.materials_needed: 1. laptop 2. earphones

records.duty: watch the symposium on phone as a member of the audience to ensure that slides and video recordings are shown properly for Zoom participants throughout the event
ensure that both onsite camcorders are on by watching on Zoom
Put room temp water and snacks on the table at the outset
records.materials_needed: 1. Paper notice for water?

records.duty: Signing in and giving lanyards and onsite registration
records.materials_needed: 1. sign-in sheet for registrants; 2. sign-in sheet for law RPg students; 3. registration form for onsite participants 4. lanyards (orange for speakers; green for participants including Julie Chen and WYNG representatives; black for temp registrants; red for suppor team) 5. laptop for checkinng emails and watching on Zoom 6. programme booklet to be provided if needed

records.duty: Show the participant location of his/her seat (if not busy)
records.materials_needed: 1. seating plan

records.duty: Refill Water for water jugs on head table during break and forfor water jugs on tables in the lobby during break
records.materials_needed: 1. access to pantry on 9/F (water dispenser inside pandry)

records.duty: Time keeper
records.materials_needed: 1. "1 minute left" card and "Time is u"p card

records.duty: Change slides
records.materials_needed: uploaded to the desktop: 1. slides;

records.duty: Play video recording and click maximise quality
records.materials_needed: uploaded to the desktop: 1. MP4 of Prof Chen's video

records.duty: Change name stands at the head table (seat nos. 89-93)
records.materials_needed: Name stands for all speakers and chairs and Julie Chen

records.duty: In the morning break, (a) pick up 2 boxes of salad wraps and 2 pots of Coffee and 1 pot of tea at Alfafa and put them on the table (*two queues for food and drinks) and (b) put cutlery and tissue on table
records.materials_needed: 1. receipts 2. paper notices each showing description of the food or drink

records.duty: In the afternoon break, (b) pick up 2 boxes of fruit tarts and 2 pots of Coffee and 1 pot of tea at Alfafa and put them on the table (*two queues for food and drinks) and (b) put cutlery and tissue on table
records.materials_needed: 1. receipts 2. paper notices each showing description of the food or drink

records.duty: hold a "?" card, accompany speakers to Bijas, the restaurant for lunch (1:40 pm)
records.materials_needed: 1. "?" card

records.duty: Be at Bijas at 1:40 pm to accompany the speakers back to ACR
hold a "?" card, accompany speakers to SCR, the restaurant for dinner
records.materials_needed: 1. "?" card

records.duty: stay in ACR if any equipment is left there and in case anyone leaves any belonging behind? Main entrance of ACR will not be locked
records.materials_needed: 1. takeaway lunch

records.duty: Collect lanyards used
records.materials_needed: Box for collection of lanyards

records.duty: Be the MC, in particular, invite each chair to present a set of metal bookmarks to each speaker at thend of session 1, 2 and 3 and after presentation of Dr Siraj
Give souvenir to chair for presentation to each of the eleven speakers
records.materials_needed: 1. 11 sets of metal bookmarks plus one spare set?

records.duty: Taking 1 photo for presentation of each souvenir and group photos for each session and for the whole conference and taking photos throughout the symposium
records.materials_needed: 1. phone for taking photos

records.duty: Ensure that the two glass doors and (after ensuring that no one is in the washroom) the wood door are locked
